attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	 SBH.PNR_LOCATOR2 as  BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID
	,SBH.GDS_CODE2 as BK_AMEX_GDS_CD
	,SBH.CUSTOMER_ID2  as BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID
	,SBH.PAX_SEQUENCE2 as BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT
	,SBH.HTL_SEQUENCE as BK_HOTEL_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT
	,SBH.ORIGINAL_AMOUNT as HOTEL_ROOM_LOCAL_RT_AMT
	,SBH.CONVERTED_AMOUNT0 as HOTEL_ROOM_REPORTING_RT_AMT
    ,COALESCE(SBH.HOTEL_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  as HOTEL_NAME
	,COALESCE( cast(SBH.CHECKIN_DATE as date) , cast('1900-01-01' as date) )            as HOTEL_ARRIVAL_DT
	,SBH.CHECKOUT_DATE as HOTEL_CHECKOUT_DT
	,SBH.NUMBER_NIGHTS as HOTEL_ROOM_NIGHT_CNT
	,SBH.NUMBER_ROOMS as HOTEL_ROOM_CNT
	,SBH.STATE as HOTEL_STATE_CD
	,SBH.CITY as HOTEL_CITY_NAME
	,COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )  as LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD
	,COALESCE( NICNT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SBH.COUNTRY,'UNK' )   as HOTEL_COUNTRY_CD /* added  SBH.COUNTRY  in R10   */
	,COALESCE( NICO.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )  as REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD 
   /* New columns in R10 */
		,COALESCE( BOOKING_STATUS,'=')  as HOTEL_ROOM_BOOKING_STATUS_CD
		,COALESCE( CHAIN	,'=')  as  HOTEL_CHAIN_CD
        ,CONFIRMATION	 as HOTEL_ROOM_BOOKING_CONF_NUM
		,COALESCE(DOM_INTL,'=')   as 	HOTEL_DOMESTIC_INTRNTNL_CD
        ,NUMBER_GUESTS	 as HOTEL_BOOKING_GUEST_CNT
        ,ROOM_TYPE	 as HOTEL_ROOM_TYPE_CD
        ,RATE_TYPE	   as HOTEL_RATE_TYPE_CD
		,PROPERTY	 as HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM
		,ADDRESS	  as HOTEL_STREET_ADDR
		,COALESCE(ZIPCODE,'UNKNOWN') as HOTEL_POSTAL_CD
		,COALESCE(CITY_CODE	,'=')  as HOTEL_CITY_CD
        ,COALESCE(PHONE,'UNKNOWN') as HOTEL_PHONE_NUM
		,COALESCE(REASON_CODE	,'=')  as HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_REASON_CD
		,'I' as ACTION_CODE	
	    ,'I' as DML_TYPE
        /* */ 
FROM 
   ( SELECT                      
         PNR_LOCATOR2    ,       
         GDS_CODE2       ,
         CUSTOMER_ID2    ,       
         PAX_SEQUENCE2   ,       
         HTL_SEQUENCE    ,       
         ORIGINAL_AMOUNT ,       
         CONVERTED_AMOUNT0,      
         HOTEL_NAME,             
         CHECKIN_DATE,           
         CHECKOUT_DATE,          
         NUMBER_NIGHTS,          
         NUMBER_ROOMS ,          
         STATE        ,          
         CITY         ,          
         ORIGINAL_CURRENCY0,     
         COUNTRY,                
         CONVERTED_CURRENCY0 ,
			BOOKING_STATUS,
			CONFIRMATION,
			RATE_TYPE,
			CHAIN,
			PROPERTY,
			ROOM_TYPE,
			NUMBER_GUESTS,
			ADDRESS,
			ZIPCODE,
			PHONE,
			CITY_CODE,
			DOM_INTL,
			REASON_CODE
     FROM                        
       $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_HOTEL   
   )SBH
Inner Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	ON   (	NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID       =  SBH.PNR_LOCATOR2
	        and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD          =  SBH.GDS_CODE2
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID      =  SBH.CUSTOMER_ID2
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT =SBH.PAX_SEQUENCE2  )
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY NIC
	ON SBH.ORIGINAL_CURRENCY0 = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY NICO
	ON SBH.CONVERTED_CURRENCY0 = NICO.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOC   
	ON  SBH.COUNTRY= ETCISOC. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICNT 
	ON ETCISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICNT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SELECT 
BATCH_ID                      ,
XPK_ROW2                      ,
FK_TRAVEL2                    ,
STATE                         ,
CONFIRMATION                  ,
CONVERTED_CURRENCY0           ,
GDS_CODE2                     ,
ADDRESS                       ,
CITY                          ,
CITY_CODE                     ,
COUNTRY                       ,
CONVERTED_AMOUNT0             ,
NUMBER_GUESTS                 ,
CUSTOMER_ID2                  ,
PAX_SEQUENCE2                 ,
CHAIN                         ,
NUMBER_NIGHTS                 ,
RATE_TYPE                     ,
ZIPCODE                       ,
BOOKING_DATE0                 ,
NUMBER_ROOMS                  ,
ORIGINAL_CURRENCY0            ,
ROOM_TYPE                     ,
PROPERTY                      ,
CHECKOUT_DATE                 ,
PNR_LOCATOR2                  ,
DOM_INTL                      ,
HOTEL_NAME                    ,
BOOKING_TYPE                  ,
ORIGINAL_AMOUNT               ,
REASON_CODE                   ,
BOOKING_STATUS                ,
PHONE                         ,
CHECKIN_DATE                  ,
HTL_SEQUENCE                  ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
'RI' as  EXCEPTION_TYPE  
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_HOTEL SBH
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
           (  SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	            WHERE NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID  = SBH.PNR_LOCATOR2
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD           = SBH.GDS_CODE2
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID      = SBH.CUSTOMER_ID2
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT = SBH.PAX_SEQUENCE2  
	        )
